singleUseTokens.reason: Exhausted by 'find all weapon flags' — only 13 sovereigns means every weapon flag has been seen after the solo puzzle, and compounds like 'Africa + weapon' produce tiny contrived sets.
Tiny enough (5 sovereigns) that even the solo puzzle is borderline; compounds would be 1-2 flags and play as trivia, not 'find all'.
Same exhaustion logic as weapon — solo puzzle covers everything, compounds get contrived.
